---
lightbox: true
---

::: {.column-screen-inset}

## Finse field work gallery

::: {layout-nrow=3}

![A Lovely Image](./media/pism.png){group="my-gallery"}

![Another Lovely Image](./media/cnn.png){group="my-gallery"}

![The Last Lovely Image](./media/alt.png){group="my-gallery"}

![Ben in front of Austdalsbeern with a drone.](media/benjamin.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![Fifth Lovely Image](./media/benjamin.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![Sixth Lovely Image](./media/flight.png){group="my-gallery"}
 
:::

:::
